title: Programming Lab TA
description: Help students during weekly lab sessions, answer simple coding questions, and support marking preparation.

title: Data Workshop TA
description: Support the workshop on spreadsheets and introductory data analysis tasks for international students.

title: Office Hour Assistant
description: Assist in office hours, manage attendance, and provide basic academic support to students.

title: Algorithm Workshop TA
description: Conduct weekly problem-solving sessions, review student submissions, and provide hints on competitive programming challenges.

title: Machine Learning Lab Assistant
description: Support students in implementing ML models using scikit-learn and PyTorch. Assist with Jupyter notebooks and debugging.

title: Seminar Coordination Assistant
description: Help coordinate seminar scheduling, prepare slide templates, and assist students with presentation delivery techniques.

title: Database Lab TA
description: Guide students through SQL labs, ERD design exercises, and support final project assessment preparation.

title: Python Bootcamp TA
description: Support beginner students in a one-week intensive Python bootcamp covering variables, loops, functions and file I/O.

title: Research Methods TA
description: Assist postgraduate students with literature review techniques, citation tools, and quantitative research methods.
